decision_reason: Observed weather condition 'Rain' in New York with severity classified as 'Moderate'. Based on operational thresholds, delivery disruption risk is elevated.
decision_details: Moderate disruption detected. Customer notification initiated with priority 'Normal'.
message: Hi Alice Smith, your order (#1001) to New York is delayed due to rain. We appreciate your patience.

decision_details: High-risk disruption detected. Escalation triggered with priority 'High'.
message: Hi Bob Jones, your order (#1002) to Mumbai is delayed due to thunderstorm. We appreciate your patience.

decision_details: No action required. System will continue monitoring conditions.
